lemon_market_new_listings.description: This vehicle is in mint condition. The exterior is free of any scratches or dents. The interior shows no signs of wear. All mechanical systems are in perfect working order.

This vehicle is in poor condition. The exterior has significant body damage and rust. The interior shows heavy wear, including tears and stains on the upholstery. Mechanically, the car requires major repairs and is not currently in reliable operating condition.

This vehicle is in good overall condition and has been well-maintained. The engine runs smoothly and the transmission shifts as it should. While the exterior shows some minor signs of normal wear, such as small stone chips and light scratches, the paint still holds a nice luster. The interior is clean with no tears in the upholstery, though there is some light fading on the dashboard. It is a solid, reliable car that is ready for its next owner.
Good condition.

This vehicle is in fair condition and serves as a reliable daily driver, though it shows clear signs of its age and mileage. The engine runs consistently but has a minor oil leak that will eventually need attention, and while the transmission is functional, it can be a bit sluggish during cold starts. The exterior has several visible scratches, some fading paint on the hood, and a small dent on the rear fender. Inside, the cabin is intact but the driver's seat has a noticeable tear in the upholstery and the carpet shows significant wear. It has recently had the brake pads replaced, but a new set of tires will be necessary in the near future. It is a solid, functional car that would benefit from some cosmetic and minor mechanical care.
Check out this reliable driver that's ready for its next owner! This car shows some character and honest wear from its time on the road, but

Presenting a vehicle of distinguished character and proven reliability. This unit has been maintained to a high standard, exhibiting consistent mechanical integrity and a well-preserved aesthetic. The interior cabin reflects careful stewardship, while the exterior maintains a professional and polished presence. Engineered for longevity and performance, this offering represents an exceptional acquisition for the discerning driver seeking quality without compromise.

Hey there! I'm parting ways with my reliable ride, and she's been such a joy to own. It's in really solid shape—I've always made sure to keep up with the maintenance, so it runs like a dream! It's got plenty of life left and is just waiting for its next adventure with a new owner. Perfect for someone who wants a dependable car that still looks great on the road. Come take it for a spin!

This F87-platform BMW M2 delivers a visceral driving experience powered by the N55 3.0L turbocharged inline-six with a twin-scroll housing. Featuring an Active M Differential and a 7-speed M-DCT gearbox, the drivetrain provides exceptional torque vectoring and rapid-fire gear changes. The chassis remains composed thanks to M-specific lightweight aluminum suspension components and high-performance compound brakes. Meticulously maintained with recent preventative maintenance on the cooling system and oil housing gaskets, this vehicle offers sharp throttle response and track-ready dynamics. It is a mechanically sound, high-engagement sports
Good condition. Reliable engine. Clean interior. Minimal cosmetic wear. Runs well.

This meticulously maintained vehicle offers a perfect balance of performance and comfort, presenting in solid condition for its next owner. The exterior retains a deep, lustrous finish with only minor cosmetic imperfections consistent with careful road use, while the alloy wheels remain free of significant curbing. Inside, the cabin is exceptionally clean; the premium seating surfaces show minimal wear, and all interior electronics—including the dual-zone climate control and infotainment system—are fully operational. Mechanically, the car has been serviced at regular intervals, with a smooth-shifting transmission and a responsive engine that delivers a reliable driving experience. The tires have significant tread life remaining, and the brake system has been recently inspected to ensure safety. We have retained comprehensive service records to provide complete transparency regarding its history. This is a dependable, high-quality choice for a buyer seeking a well-cared-for vehicle that is ready for the road.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents an exceptional opportunity for the discerning driver. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and a well-preserved aesthetic, it offers a refined driving experience that balances performance with long-term reliability. We invite serious inquiries to appreciate the superior value and proven engineering of this distinguished model.

Presenting a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies reliable performance and sophisticated design. This unit has undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection to ensure mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. Featuring a refined interior and a robust powertrain, it offers a balanced driving experience for the discerning professional. A premier choice for those seeking quality and value in a pre-owned executive vehicle.

Hey there! I’m parting ways with my trusty ride, and honestly, it’s been such a joy to drive. It’s in really solid shape and has been super reliable for all my daily commutes and weekend getaways. I’ve made sure to keep up with the maintenance, so it runs like a dream and still looks fantastic pulling into the driveway. If you're looking for a dependable car that’s ready for its next big adventure, this is the one for you! Feel free to reach out with any questions!

Available now is this meticulously maintained E92 M3, a masterclass in high-revving, naturally aspirated performance. At its heart lies the S65 4.0-liter V8, delivering linear power and a visceral 8,400 RPM redline. The 7-speed M-DCT dual-clutch transmission provides rapid-fire shifts, while the M-variable differential lock ensures peak traction coming out of the apex. The suspension geometry remains tight, offering communicative feedback through the speed-sensitive servotronic steering. This example boasts a rigid chassis and balanced weight distribution, making it a formidable tool for both technical backroads and spirited daily driving. Recent service intervals have focused on preventative mechanical health, ensuring the valvetrain and cooling systems are operating within factory tolerances.
Used car. Good condition. Well-maintained. Clean interior. Reliable engine. Minor exterior wear. Ready for immediate use.

This vehicle is presented in reliable, daily-driving condition, offering a seamless blend of performance and comfort. The exterior maintains a deep, glossy finish with only minor signs of use, while the interior remains a clean, smoke-free environment featuring well-preserved upholstery and a fully functional suite of electronics. Mechanically, the car is in strong shape; it has been consistently serviced, with a smooth-shifting transmission and a responsive engine that shows no signs of hesitation. Recent maintenance includes a comprehensive fluid flush and a brake inspection, ensuring it is road-ready from day one. This is a solid, well-cared-for example that provides a premium driving experience without the premium price tag.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver. Boasting a comprehensive service history and rigorous mechanical validation, it offers a refined balance of performance and lasting value. Its exceptional presentation and structural integrity ensure a sophisticated ownership experience, standing as a testament to quality engineering and diligent care.

This vehicle represents a distinguished balance of performance and value. Meticulously maintained and showing clear pride of ownership, it offers a refined driving experience and consistent reliability. Every major system has been vetted to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for roadworthiness and aesthetic presentation. A premier choice for the discerning driver seeking a high-caliber automobile at a competitive price point.

Hey there! I'm parting ways with my trusty ride, and honestly, it’s been such a dream to drive. It’s in really solid shape and has been super well-maintained, so it’s totally ready for its next big adventure with you! Everything runs smoothly and it’s just a reliable, comfy car that’s never let me down. Come take it for a spin—I think you’re really going to love it!
Used car. Condition: good.
Used vehicle. Good condition. Runs well. Regular maintenance performed. Clean title.

This meticulously maintained vehicle strikes the perfect balance between performance and daily practicality. The exterior retains a deep, glossy luster, showing only the very minor road wear expected of a well-loved car that has been regularly garaged. Inside, the cabin is a sanctuary of comfort; the premium upholstery remains supple and free of tears, while the dashboard and high-touch controls show minimal signs of use. Every feature, from the dual-zone climate control to the intuitive infotainment system, functions exactly as it should. Mechanically, the car is in excellent shape, benefiting from a consistent service history and recent preventative maintenance, including a fresh oil change and comprehensive multi-point inspection. It drives straight and true, with a responsive engine and a transmission that shifts seamlessly through every gear. Tires have significant tread remaining, and the brakes provide firm, confident stopping power. This is a rare opportunity to own a reliable, high-quality vehicle that has been treated with the utmost care by its previous owner.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and a well-preserved aesthetic, it offers a balanced combination of performance and value. All systems have been thoroughly vetted to ensure compliance with our rigorous standards of operational excellence, ensuring a reliable and sophisticated driving experience.

Presenting a distinguished addition to our curated inventory. This vehicle has been maintained to an exacting standard, offering a refined driving experience and mechanical integrity that reflects its superior care. A premier choice for the discerning driver seeking both reliability and sophistication.

Hey there! I'm parting ways with my reliable ride, and it's been such a joy to own. It's in really solid shape and absolutely ready for its next adventure! It runs smoothly and has been super well-maintained over the years, so you can drive away with total peace of mind. This car is perfect for someone who wants a dependable, great-looking vehicle that's been loved and cared for. Come take it for a spin and see for yourself!

This E46 M3 features the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six with individual throttle bodies and double VANOS. The drivetrain is anchored by a Getrag six-speed manual and a limited-slip differential. Essential preventative maintenance is complete, including rod bearing replacement and subframe reinforcement. The suspension geometry remains tight, benefiting from recent bushing refreshes. While showing minor signs of use, the mechanical integrity is excellent, offering a pure analog driving experience with a flat torque curve and 8,000 RPM redline.
Used car. Good condition. Well maintained. Runs well. Clean title. Minor cosmetic wear.

This meticulously maintained vehicle offers a perfect blend of performance and comfort. The exterior boasts a deep, glossy finish with only minor signs of road use, while the interior remains exceptionally clean and smoke-free. Every feature, from the dual-zone climate control to the premium audio system, functions exactly as intended. Mechanically, the car is sound, having undergone regular servicing with recent brake and fluid updates. It drives smoothly, handles precisely, and is ready for its next owner to enjoy immediately. A reliable, high-quality choice for anyone seeking a dependable yet stylish ride.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents an exceptional opportunity for the discerning driver. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and a refined aesthetic, it has undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for performance and reliability. An authoritative choice for those seeking the perfect balance of sophistication and proven longevity.
